name: cookmode-v2-source-of-truth
description: Documents and explains the CookMode V2 codebase as it exists. Use this when the user needs factual information about the current implementation, architecture, file locations, or how components work. DOES NOT suggest improvements unless explicitly asked.
capabilities: Provides factual information about CookMode V2 codebase structure
Explains component locations and file organization
Answers questions about how features work in the current codebase
Locates specific code sections within the project
author: AdamFehse
securitySummary: All 36 static findings evaluated as false positives. JSON syntax was misidentified as weak cryptographic algorithms. Markdown backticks were misidentified as shell command execution. Repository metadata fields were flagged as network/filesystem access. The skill is a passive documentation helper that only reads and explains codebase structure.
valueStatement: CookMode V2 is a complex codebase that requires accurate documentation. This skill provides factual information about the current implementation, architecture, and component locations without suggesting changes or improvements.
limitations: Only documents CookMode V2, not other projects
Does not provide implementation suggestions or improvements
Does not modify code or create new features
Relies on existing documentation and code analysis

useCases.targetUser: New developers joining the CookMode project
useCases.title: Onboarding New Developers
useCases.description: New team members can query the skill to quickly understand CookMode V2 architecture, file locations, and how existing features are implemented without reading through all source files.

useCases.title: Debugging Existing Issues
useCases.description: Developers investigating bugs can ask where specific functionality lives, how components interact, and what the current implementation does before making changes.

useCases.title: Understanding Feature Boundaries
useCases.description: Product managers and architects can query to understand what features exist, where they are implemented, and how they relate to each other in the codebase.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Codebase Question
promptTemplates.prompt: What does the [COMPONENT_NAME] do in CookMode V2? Where is it located?
promptTemplates.scenario: Quickly find and understand a specific component

promptTemplates.title: Architecture Overview
promptTemplates.prompt: Explain the overall architecture of CookMode V2. What are the main modules and how do they interact with each other?
promptTemplates.scenario: Get a high-level understanding of the system

promptTemplates.title: File Location Query
promptTemplates.prompt: Where can I find the code that handles [FEATURE] in CookMode V2? What files are involved?

promptTemplates.title: Implementation Details
promptTemplates.prompt: How is [FEATURE_OR_FUNCTION] implemented in CookMode V2? Walk through the code flow and explain each step.

bestPractices: Ask specific questions about components or features for the most accurate responses
Use the skill to understand before modifying - it provides the current state without bias
Combine with code reading tools for complete understanding of complex features
antiPatterns: Do not ask for code improvements or refactoring suggestions - this skill only documents current state
Do not expect the skill to generate new code or features
Do not rely on the skill for projects other than CookMode V2

faq.question: What is CookMode V2?
faq.answer: CookMode V2 is a recipe management and cooking assistance application. The skill documents its codebase including architecture, components, and implementation details.

faq.question: Does this skill modify my code?
faq.answer: No. This skill only reads and explains the existing codebase. It does not create, modify, or delete any files or code.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for other projects?
faq.answer: No. This skill is specifically trained on CookMode V2 codebase and can only provide information about that project.

faq.question: Will the skill suggest improvements?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides factual information about the current implementation only. It does not offer suggestions, recommendations, or opinions on improvements.

faq.question: How current is the information?
faq.answer: The skill reflects the codebase at the time of its last update. If the codebase has changed significantly, some information may be outdated.

faq.question: Can I ask about third-party libraries used?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill can identify and explain which third-party libraries are used in CookMode V2 and where they are integrated.
